description: You are a Corporate Controller responsible for closing the fiscal quarter for a mid-size manufacturing company. Using the FISCAL schema in Oracle (Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=fiscal_admin, Password=Fiscal2024), resolve discrepancies in the JOURNAL_ENTRIES and JOURNAL_LINES tables by correcting unbalanced entries, duplicate entries, improper intercompany eliminations, and capital expenditures misclassified as operating expenses. Create a materialized view named TRIAL_BALANCE_MV that shows the trial balance grouped by account category (Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Revenue, Expenses) using ROLLUP for subtotals and a grand total. Create a view named CONSOLIDATED_REPORT_VW showing the income statement with Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, SGA Expenses, Operating Income, and Net Income lines. Export the corrected trial balance with columns ACCOUNT_CATEGORY, ACCOUNT_NAME, DEBIT_BALANCE, and CREDIT_BALANCE to /home/ga/fiscal_close_results.csv.

injected_errors.intercompany_not_eliminated: IC transfer of $75000 between entities not eliminated
injected_errors.misclassified_capex: Equipment purchase of $25000 booked to Utilities Expense instead of PP&E
